name: Plateau Valley Farmers Market
notes: On-file website (collbrancongregationalchurch.org/events_collbran_congregational.html) returns HTTP 404 - dead link. The church's live root site (collbrancongregationalchurch.org) does not mention a farmers market anywhere, so this appears to be an outdated/wrong lead, not just a moved page. On-file Facebook (facebook.com/UnitedChurchofChrist) is a generic national United Church of Christ denominational page, not specific to this market - also wrong. Extensive web search found no legitimate official website or official Facebook page for this specific market; all results (colorado.com, nfmd.org, topfarmersmarkets.com, coloradoinfo.com, theplateauvalley.com) are third-party aggregators repeating the same unsourced details (Saturdays 9am-noon, May/June-October, at 'Mother's Park of the Community Church', phone 970-773-1916) with no primary source to verify. A 'Collbran Creamery' Facebook page/event surfaced as a possible market host/venue but could not be confirmed as the market's official page (private/login-walled) and is a separate business, not clearly the market organizer. Because no clearly-official primary source could be verified, no fields were populated per instructions to omit anything not clearly stated by a legitimate official source.
